name: oap-email
description: Ask about your email or manage your inbox in natural language. Questions: 'anything urgent today?', 'emails from Amy', 'what came in overnight?', 'anything about the invoice?'. Manager: 'run the email manager', 'show mailing lists for review', 'always archive emails from @medium.com', 'unsubscribe from @retailer.com', 'keep NYT newsletters', 'show pending drafts', 'approve draft', 'send draft'. Sender preferences: 'always treat @facebook.com as noise', 'mark joe@cpa.us as important'.

input.description: Use action='ask' for any natural language question. Use 'manage' to run autonomous inbox management. Use 'preferences_add' to teach a rule, 'preferences_list' to see rules, 'manager_log' to see what was done.

action.description: ask (questions), manage (run autonomous management), mailing_lists (show senders needing keep/unsubscribe decision), reclassify_mailing_lists (re-run classifier on mailing-list messages using Claude for accuracy — requires escalation enabled), reclassify_diff (show what changed after last reclassify), preferences_add, preferences_list, preferences_remove, manager_log, relationships_list, drafts_list, drafts_approve, drafts_reject, drafts_send

question.description: For ask action — your natural language question about email.

manager_action.description: For preferences_add — what to do: archive, unsubscribe, ignore, flag, draft_reply

output.description: For ask: messages with sender, subject, priority, snippet. For manage: summary of actions taken. For preferences/log/drafts: respective lists.
